message:
chore(ci): drop dead 'master' branch from notify-acfs workflow triggers

Narrow push and pull_request branch filters from [main, master] to
[main]. The repo only uses 'main' as its default branch — 'master'
never existed and could never trigger.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,13 +11,13 @@ name: Notify ACFS of Installer Change
 
 on:
   push:
-    branches: [main, master]
+    branches: [main]
     paths:
       - 'install.sh'
       - 'scripts/install.sh'
       - '**/install.sh'
   pull_request:
-    branches: [main, master]
+    branches: [main]
     paths:
       - 'install.sh'
       - 'scripts/install.sh'
